hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -n "$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON" ]; then echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\",\"reason\":\"$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON\",\"hook\":\"bmad-gate\"}" >> ~/.claude/override-log.jsonl; exit 0; fi; FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$FILE" in *"/src/"*|*"/app/"*) for f in docs/prd.md docs/architecture.md .bmad-readiness-passed; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"BMAD gate: $f missing. Run /new-greenfield-project or set CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON.\"}"; exit 0; }; done;; esac'

bash -c 'if [ -n "$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON" ]; then echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\",\"reason\":\"$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON\",\"hook\":\"codex-gate\"}" >> ~/.claude/override-log.jsonl; exit 0; fi; if [ ! -f .codex-review-passed ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"No .codex-review-passed marker. Run /codex-review-gate before push.\"}"; exit 0; fi; MARKER=$(jq -r .commit .codex-review-passed 2>/dev/null); HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); if [ "$MARKER" != "$HEAD" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Codex review marker is stale (marker=$MARKER head=$HEAD). Re-run /codex-review-gate.\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks protect --staged --no-banner --exit-code 1 2>&1 | head -20 || { echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"gitleaks detected potential secrets in staged diff\"}"; exit 0; }; fi'

bash -c 'STATUS=""; for f in docs/prd.md docs/architecture.md docs/ux-design.md docs/threat-model.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || STATUS="$STATUS missing:$f"; done; [ -f .bmad-readiness-passed ] || STATUS="$STATUS missing:readiness-gate"; if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"BMAD state incomplete:$STATUS. Use /new-greenfield-project to scaffold or /bmad-help.\"}}"; fi'
